dict.string: DMAR Table with stripped Memory Regions
Global Darwin (macOS) detection helper for other SSDTs
Disables AWAC in favor of RTC
Fixes Shutdown. System doesn't turn off otherwise.
Stops Power LED from pulsing after Sleep
Enables EC read/write access for YogaSMC
Change GPRW(2,N) to XPRW, pair with SSDT-GPRW
Change _PTS(1,N) to ZPTS, pair with SSDT-PTSWAK
Change _WAK to ZWAK(1,S), pair with SSDT-PTSWAK
V2.0.0 | For reading sensor data from Lenovo Laptops
V1.3.1 | Injects Frequency Vectors for CPU Powermanagement
V1.3.8 | CPU temp monitoring (req. 3rd party app)
V1.3.8 | Fan speed monitoring (req. 3rd party app)
V1.1.4 | Improves power management for Non-Apple NVMEs
V1.4.1 | Allows AMFI to work with lowered SIP
V1.1.7 | Enables OTA updates on root-patched macOS
V1.0 | Required for using AirportItlwm in macOS 15.x
V1200.12.2b1 | Required for using AirportItlwm in macOS 15.x
V2.4.0 | Intel WiFi Driver for macOS 14.x
V2.4.0 | Intel WiFi Driver for macOS 15+. Requires Root Patching
V2.4.0 | Intel WiFI Driver (req. HeliPort app)
V2.5.0 | No longer neded/handled by IntelBluetoothFirmware
V2.5.0 | Firmware for Intel Bluetooth Card
V2.5.0 | Only needed on macOS 11 and older
V1.1.7 | Duplicate - also included in VoodooRMI kext
V1 | For TrackPads controlled via I2C
V3.0 | For TrackPads controlled via SMBUS
V0.9.7 | Kext for MicroSD Card Reader
V1.0.8 | Fixes issues with CMOS (RTC) memory
V1 | Disables BDPROCHOT protocol after S3 Sleep
Disables BD(Bi-directional) PROCHOT to prevent throttling
Resets NVRAM except for the order of Boot Menu Entries
Fix black screen on wake from hibernation for Lenovo Thinkpad T490
